title: FL Castmember - TrashHandlers
body:
TH-101138: Cleaning day is such a funny thing. Us TrashHandlers have to clean everyday then once a month they require all regular employees to help?

TH-050255: I am so tired of cleaning up this fantasy stuff, can’t we just cleanse it all with lava and restart?

TH-101138: Cleanse it with lava, rebuild from scratch, let us create stuff sometimes too.

TH-050255: Yeah maybe we should get a “Creation day” where us TrashHandlers get to create whatever random stuff we want? Going to be a lot more lava thats for sure.

TH-101138: Lava gang roll in, break things, melt stuff, clean up, sign off!
